zh: 編碼，指使用電腦語言撰寫程式的過程。
en: Coding is based on many different languages that computers understand.
en_example: Coding is based on many different languages that computers understand.
zh_example: Coding is based on many different languages that computers understand.
ja: コーディングとは、コンピュータが理解できる様々な言語を使ってプログラムを書くこと。
ja_example: Coding is based on many different languages that computers understand.

zh: 應用程式，通常指手機或電腦上的軟體應用。
en: How did you make your app?
en_example: How did you make your app?
zh_example: How did you make your app?
ja: アプリとは、スマートフォンやコンピュータで使うソフトウェアのこと。
ja_example: How did you make your app?

zh: 蘋果公司開發的程式語言，主要用於iOS和macOS應用程式開發。
en: You're probably thinking that that's really complex unless you know the Swift coding language.
en_example: You're probably thinking that that's really complex unless you know the Swift coding language.
zh_example: You're probably thinking that that's really complex unless you know the Swift coding language.
ja: SwiftはAppleが開発したプログラミング言語で、主にiOSやmacOSのアプリ開発に使われる。
ja_example: You're probably thinking that that's really complex unless you know the Swift coding language.

zh: 計算機科學，研究計算機系統和軟體的學科。
en: 43,000 computer science students graduated into the 494,000 open computing jobs.
en_example: 43,000 computer science students graduated into the 494,000 open computing jobs.
zh_example: 43,000 computer science students graduated into the 494,000 open computing jobs.
ja: コンピュータサイエンスとは、コンピュータシステムやソフトウェアを研究する学問分野。
ja_example: 43,000 computer science students graduated into the 494,000 open computing jobs.

zh: 識字能力，指具備某種基本技能或知識的能力。
en: Code has become the fourth literacy.
en_example: Code has become the fourth literacy.
zh_example: Code has become the fourth literacy.
ja: リテラシーとは、ある基本的な技能や知識を持っている能力のこと。
ja_example: Code has become the fourth literacy.

zh: 科技，指利用科學知識來創造工具和系統。
en: Facebook, Instagram, Twitter and Uber are all examples of how we depend on technology.
en_example: Facebook, Instagram, Twitter and Uber are all examples of how we depend on technology.
zh_example: Facebook, Instagram, Twitter and Uber are all examples of how we depend on technology.
ja: テクノロジーとは、科学的知識を利用して道具やシステムを作ること。
ja_example: Facebook, Instagram, Twitter and Uber are all examples of how we depend on technology.

zh: 課程，學校或教育機構安排的教學內容。
en: Implementing coding into curriculum would definitely spark interest in coding for students.
en_example: Implementing coding into curriculum would definitely spark interest in coding for students.
zh_example: Implementing coding into curriculum would definitely spark interest in coding for students.
ja: カリキュラムとは、学校や教育機関で組まれた教育内容のこと。
ja_example: Implementing coding into curriculum would definitely spark interest in coding for students.

zh: 互動的，指能夠雙向交流或反應的。
en: Code Academy has an interactive code editor so you can learn while typing the code.
en_example: Code Academy has an interactive code editor so you can learn while typing the code.
zh_example: Code Academy has an interactive code editor so you can learn while typing the code.
ja: インタラクティブとは、双方向のやり取りや反応ができること。
ja_example: Code Academy has an interactive code editor so you can learn while typing the code.

zh: 教學影片或指導，通常用來學習新技能。
en: YouTube has endless tutorials about using numerous coding languages.
en_example: YouTube has endless tutorials about using numerous coding languages.
zh_example: YouTube has endless tutorials about using numerous coding languages.
ja: チュートリアルとは、新しいスキルを学ぶための指導や動画のこと。
ja_example: YouTube has endless tutorials about using numerous coding languages.

zh: 創辦人，指創立公司或組織的人。
en: One day you could be the founder or CEO of a major tech company.
en_example: One day you could be the founder or CEO of a major tech company.
zh_example: One day you could be the founder or CEO of a major tech company.
ja: ファウンダーとは、会社や組織を設立した人のこと。
ja_example: One day you could be the founder or CEO of a major tech company.
